comment: Populate an exhibit with media — drop in images, audio, or video from your machine.
Paste a IIIF manifest URL and Archie pulls in its folios as objects, ready to annotate.
_showoff: Box the URL field; the default Voynich seed loads folios from Yale's IIIF service.

comment: Remote images deep-zoom in place — tiles load with anonymous CORS and a 60-second timeout, no copy required.
